analysis: The project is a black holes themed educational website with interactive slides and animations. The current implementation has incomplete HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The theme needs to be enhanced with cosmic visuals, black hole animations, and interactive elements to create an immersive experience about black holes.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML structure with sections for black hole introduction, formation, types, and effects. Add interactive buttons for navigation and a mobile-friendly hamburger menu.
Enhance the CSS with cosmic-themed animations including swirling black hole effects, glowing elements, and smooth transitions. Add dark background with starfield patterns and gradient effects.
Complete the JavaScript functionality for slide navigation, interactive elements, and animations. Fix syntax errors and ensure all event listeners are properly implemented for the black hole theme.
